summary: Enterprise Blueprint testing for OCB TITAN ERP complete. All 28 backend API tests passed. Tested: AR System (Piutang), AP System (Hutang), Approval Engine, Accounting Engine. All modules integrate correctly with RBAC, auto-journal, and existing deposit system still functional.

AR_SYSTEM_TESTS.ar_list: PASS - GET /api/ar/list returns 4 items, Outstanding: Rp 16,000,000
AR_SYSTEM_TESTS.ar_summary_dashboard: PASS - GET /api/ar/summary/dashboard returns AR count and totals
AR_SYSTEM_TESTS.ar_payment_with_journal: PASS - POST /api/ar/{id}/payment records payment ARP-20260310-0004 with auto-journal JV-ARP-20260310-6F6CE3

AP_SYSTEM_TESTS.ap_summary_dashboard: PASS - GET /api/ap/summary/dashboard returns 4 AP, Outstanding: Rp 28,500,000
AP_SYSTEM_TESTS.ap_payment_with_journal: PASS - POST /api/ap/{id}/payment records payment APP-20260310-0004 with auto-journal JV-APP-20260310-C92C1D

APPROVAL_ENGINE_TESTS.approval_get_modules: PASS - GET /api/approval/modules returns 11 modules: purchase, purchase_return, sales_void, sales_return, sales_discount, price_override, stock_adjustment, deposit_difference, ar_write_off, journal_manual, expense
APPROVAL_ENGINE_TESTS.approval_list_rules: PASS - GET /api/approval/rules returns 6 rules (4 default + 2 pytest created)
APPROVAL_ENGINE_TESTS.approval_create_rule: PASS - POST /api/approval/rules creates new rule 'Pytest Test Rule - Expense > 500k'

ACCOUNTING_ENGINE_TESTS.accounting_init: PASS - POST /api/accounting/init creates default accounts and mapping
ACCOUNTING_ENGINE_TESTS.accounting_list_accounts: PASS - GET /api/accounting/accounts returns 17 accounts (includes Kas, Bank BCA, Piutang Usaha, Persediaan)
ACCOUNTING_ENGINE_TESTS.accounting_get_mapping: PASS - GET /api/accounting/mapping returns 20 mappings (ar_account: 1201, ap_account: 2101, cash_account: 1101, bank_account: 1102)
ACCOUNTING_ENGINE_TESTS.accounting_trial_balance: PASS - GET /api/accounting/trial-balance returns balanced: Debit Rp 150,000,000 = Credit Rp 150,000,000

INTEGRATION_TESTS.deposit_system_still_works: PASS - GET /api/deposit/list returns 5 deposits (non-destructive development confirmed)
INTEGRATION_TESTS.health_check: PASS - GET /api/health returns healthy, DB: ocb_titan
INTEGRATION_TESTS.api_root: PASS - GET /api returns OCB AI TITAN v2.0.0

critical_code_review_comments: ar_system.py - Well-structured with proper RBAC scope-based access (get_user_ar_scope)
ap_system.py - Mirrors AR pattern with supplier focus, proper auto-journal integration
approval_engine.py - Comprehensive with 11 module support, multi-level approval, rule-based triggers
accounting_engine.py - Complete COA, mapping, journal CRUD, and financial reports (trial balance, income statement, balance sheet)
All modules properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Non-destructive: Deposit system unchanged and working
seed_data_creation: Created via pytest: AR-HQ-20260310-0004, AP-HQ-20260310-0004, 2+ approval rules
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise Blueprint modules (AR, AP, Approval, Accounting) fully tested. All APIs working with RBAC and auto-journal integration. Sample data created: AR (AR-HQ-20260310-0001 to 0004), AP (AP-HQ-20260310-0001 to 0004), Approval rules (6 total including defaults), COA (17 accounts), Account mappings (20 mappings). Existing deposit system confirmed working (non-destructive). Trial balance is balanced at Rp 150M. Customer ID used for AR: from customers list. Supplier ID used for AP: from suppliers list.
